subcodes.title: Words spoken at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-07-04
subcodes.first_line: It has the same connection as the sun has with the mirror. Death is the name for the dissolution of this connection.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مثل تعلق آفتاب بمرآتست و موت عبارت از انقطاع این ارتباط
subcodes.subjects: @relationship of the soul to the body, @soul; spirit after death, @symbolism
